### Props

| Name               | Type      | Required | Default                                                                     | Description                                                   |
| ------------------ | --------- | -------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `integrationId`    | `string`  | ✓        | —                                                                           | Stable integration id (matches PHP-side provider id).         |
| `register`         | `string`  | ✓        | —                                                                           | OpenRegister register id (slug or uuid).                      |
| `schema`           | `string`  | ✓        | —                                                                           | OpenRegister schema id (slug or uuid).                        |
| `objectId`         | `string`  | ✓        | —                                                                           | Parent object id.                                             |
| `surface`          | `string`  |          | `'detail-page'`                                                             | Rendering surface (AD-19).                                    |
| `value`            | `string`  |          | `''`                                                                        | Optional single-entity reference (id or canonical reference). |
| `title`            | `string`  |          | `''`                                                                        | Pre-translated card title (defaults to id).                   |
| `icon`             | `object`  |          | `() =&gt; LinkVariant`                                                      | Optional Material Design Icon component.                      |
| `apiBase`          | `string`  |          | `'/apps/openregister/api'`                                                  | Base API URL.                                                 |
| `collapsible`      | `boolean` |          | `true`                                                                      | Whether the card body is collapsible.                         |
| `emptyLabel`       | `string`  |          | `() =&gt; t('nextcloud-vue', 'Nothing linked yet')`                         | Pre-translated empty-state label.                             |
| `unavailableLabel` | `string`  |          | `() =&gt; t('nextcloud-vue', 'This integration is currently unavailable.')` | Pre-translated unavailable label.                             |
